title: Schanginia baccata
parts: Schanginia baccata is a plant with potential medicinal properties, although it is not well-documented. The roots and leaves of the plant are likely the primary sources of medicinal parts. However, specific information on the exact medicinal parts is limited due to the lack of research on this species. Further studies would be necessary to fully understand its medicinal properties and which parts of the plant are most useful. The plant's medicinal properties might include antiviral or antibacterial effects.
